methods.qc: Gold uses silver stations_qc rows with qc_pass=True only
methods.degree_days: tavg=(TMAX+TMIN)/2; HDD/CDD vs base 18 C; monthly sums
methods.extremes: Hot TMAX>=32/35 C; freeze TMIN<=0 C; wet PRCP>=25.4 mm
methods.freeze_season: Freeze TMIN<=0; last spring freeze month<=6; first fall month>=7

scope: SC, NC, GA long-record USW/USC sample — portfolio demo, not full NCEI product
